title: BeansClear
description: ✅ It will remove all blocks or entities over time. (Great for BoxPvP, CrystalPvP, RandomKits, etc.)
body:
# BeansClear
BeansClear plugin allows you to remove blocks or entities within a scheduled few seconds after placing them on the ground. It can be used for Crystal PvP, Anchor PvP, RandomKits, Chest PvP, and more.

These features depend on WorldGuard to work and have customizable settings to suit your Minecraft server preferences.

**OPTIONALS:** [WorldGuard](https://modrinth.com/plugin/worldguard)

```
FLAG: beans-clear, beans-allow-block-break, beans-allow-block-place
```
